headline: OPID: on-policy skill distillation for agentic RL
summary: Mines skills from an agent's own rollouts for dense per-token rewards in long-horizon RL.

headline: GEOALIGN: geometric rollout curation for robust LLM RL
summary: Filters directionally-inconsistent rollouts to stabilize online RL fine-tuning.

headline: RolloutPipe: pipelined rollout and training for on-policy LLM RL
summary: Pipelines sample groups to cut trainer idle time in disaggregated RL.

headline: VLM-PBRS: vision-language-model-guided potential-based reward shaping
summary: Learns RL shaping potentials from a VLM's image preferences for robot manipulation.

headline: Cascaded multi-granularity pruning for on-device LLM inference
summary: Coarse-to-fine pruning for edge LLMs with a warning modern GQA+SwiGLU architectures resist it.

headline: HyperDFlash: speculative decoding for DeepSeek-V4 multi-hyper-connection
summary: Speculative-decoding drafter aligned to a frontier model's multi-path residual stream.

headline: Sparsity regularizers for more interpretable Top-k sparse autoencoders
summary: Adds soft sparsity penalties to Top-k SAEs to improve feature monosemanticity.

headline: SAE-guided activation regularization for LLM continual learning
summary: Uses an SAE feature dictionary to fight catastrophic forgetting in activation space.

headline: Nemotron-TwoTower: diffusion LM with pretrained autoregressive context
summary: Splits context-reading and denoising into two towers for 2.4x faster diffusion text generation.

headline: AnomNOVIC: prompt-free open-vocabulary anomaly recognition for robots
summary: Two-stage anomaly detector plus prompt-free classifier for unfamiliar objects in robot interaction.

headline: Eric Li resolves Erdős Problem 1061 (sum-of-divisors)
summary: Proves the count of sigma(a)+sigma(b)=sigma(a+b) pairs grows super-linearly.

headline: Eric Li resolves Erdős Problem 768 (Sylow divisor condition)
summary: Pins the exact decay constant for integers meeting the Sylow divisor condition.

headline: Proof of the density-threshold conjecture for pinwheel scheduling
summary: Kawamura proves any pinwheel instance with density <=5/6 is schedulable, settling a 1993 conjecture.

headline: NMR evidence for a loop-current state in kagome CsV3Sb5
summary: Field-independent NMR broadening argues for orbital loop currents breaking C6 symmetry.

headline: 0.651-approximation to Quantum Max Cut via Rydberg atoms
summary: Hybrid Rydberg-analog + SDP algorithm beats the prior 0.614 ratio for Quantum Max Cut.

headline: Quantum-limited subdiffraction telescopy needs multi-telescope interference
summary: Proves pairwise telescope coherences can't reach the quantum imaging limit beyond second moments.

headline: Stellar role reversal imprints features on binary-black-hole mass function
summary: Stable-mass-transfer formation predicts resolvable peaks in gravitational-wave BBH mass distributions.

headline: Debiasing the FRB population with the CHIME/FRB selection function
summary: Largest de-biased FRB study recovers intrinsic scattering-time distribution from 587k injections.

headline: AAV gene-therapy re-dosing restores hearing despite anti-AAV antibodies
summary: Second-dose AAV gene therapy safely improved hearing in 4 deaf children with pre-existing antibodies.

headline: Cliramitug antibody clears cardiac amyloid over 29-month follow-up
summary: Anti-TTR antibody continued reducing cardiac amyloid burden in a long-term open-label extension.

headline: VR plus synchronized neurostimulation doubles upper-limb stroke recovery
summary: Randomized feasibility trial pairing immersive VR with timed nerve stimulation outperformed standard rehab.

headline: Exercise cuts tau pathology via neuronal Complex I; a gene mimics it
summary: Exercise reduced hippocampal tau in mice via mitochondrial Complex I; expressing Ndi1 reproduced the effect.

headline: Human intracranial map of consciousness returning from anesthesia
summary: Intracranial recordings track propofol emergence; conscious return coincides with a high-gamma transformation.

headline: Olfactory loss enhances visual learning in fruit flies via circuit rewiring
summary: Smell loss boosts visual learning in Drosophila through synaptic reweighting and disinhibition.

headline: Hybridisation and herbivory fuel Amazonian tree diversity
summary: Inga tree genomes show syngameons swapping chemical-defense genes to track insect herbivores.

headline: APOE e4 homozygotes show altered plasma proteome decades early
summary: Plasma proteomics finds early changes in APOE e4/e4 carriers, with a semaglutide reversal signal.

headline: MLX adds small-batch quantized matvec kernel for faster local decode
summary: New Metal qmv_wide kernel and RMSNorm register-caching target single-stream token-generation latency.

headline: llama.cpp absorbs this week's new models and Apple multimodal packaging
summary: GGUF support for LFM2.5 and Baidu Unlimited-OCR plus libmtmd in the Apple XCFramework.

headline: Netflix replaces bespoke batch scheduling with Kueue
summary: Netflix migrated millions of batch jobs to CNCF Kueue on its Kubernetes-native Titus platform.

headline: Patterns for building cybersecurity evals (Eugene Yan)
summary: Decomposes LLM cybersecurity evals into sandboxed target, difficulty inputs, tools, and grader.

headline: Apple: nine LLM judges give two effective votes
summary: Apple paper shows correlated errors mean LLM-judge panels have far fewer independent votes than judges.

headline: What happened after 2,000 people tried to hack my AI assistant (Willison)
summary: ~6,000 prompt-injection attempts on a test agent, none fully succeeded; injection-hardening is improving.

headline: Prompt injection as role confusion (Willison)
summary: Models over-weight text style over role markers, enabling style-based jailbreaks.

headline: Scaling Laws, Carefully (Lilian Weng)
summary: Careful survey of neural scaling laws and compute-optimal allocation.

headline: Building a quantum universe splitter (dnhkng)
summary: Hardware build log using single-quantum events for genuine randomness.

headline: The worthlessness of vitamin D is mildly exaggerated (dynomight)
summary: Argues vitamin-D skeptics over-corrected; trials read weak-but-positive with reasonable priors.

headline: macOS.Gaslight: Rust backdoor that prompt-injects the AI analyst
summary: DPRK-aligned macOS implant embeds fake LLM messages to derail AI-assisted triage.

headline: STOCKSTAY: Turla's parallel backdoor ecosystem vs Ukraine
summary: FSB-linked Turla builds redundant .NET backdoors to retain access after tools are burned.

headline: Universal cloud bucket-hijacking across AWS/Azure/GCP (Unit 42)
summary: Recreating a deleted bucket under the same global name silently reroutes the victim's data stream.

headline: Large-scale credential attacks on edge security devices (Unit 42)
summary: Internet-wide spray harvests device configs, cracks stored creds, and re-logs in as admin.
